blockedFallbackSlugs.reason: RIASEC topic route and CMS graph authority are not ready for topic fallback exposure.
Not part of current stable topic fallback set.
Career surfaces use dedicated career authority and must not enter topic fallback implicitly.

rows.authorityRule: topic CTA renders from landing_surface_v1 when present; otherwise only approved compatibility fixture slugs may render fallback links.
rows.blocksWhen: A future topic page without landing_surface_v1 attempts to render frontend fallback CTA links outside the compatibility fixture.

rows.authorityRule: llms.txt may only use the shared compatibility fixture when CMS topics are unavailable; the fixture must stay in parity with llms-full.
rows.blocksWhen: llms.txt topic exposure widens without backend/CMS authority or a reviewed compatibility fixture update.

rows.authorityRule: llms-full may only use the shared compatibility fixture when CMS topics are unavailable; enrichment still attempts backend/CMS topic detail before adding summary/FAQ/next steps.
rows.blocksWhen: llms-full topic fallback is enriched or widened without answer/evidence readiness or compatibility fixture approval.

hardRules: no silent topic addition to llms
no topic exposure without backend/CMS or explicit compatibility fixture
no llms-full enrichment without answer/evidence readiness
topic CTA must prefer landing_surface_v1 / CMS
future topic expansion must require authority entry
